applies_to: Traditional IRA owners whose sole beneficiary is not a spouse >10 years younger
note: Divisor decreases with age → RMD percentage increases. SECURE 2.0: RMD start age is 73 for birth years 1951-1959, 75 for 1960+.
joint_life_table_note: If sole beneficiary is spouse >10 years younger, use Joint Life and Last Survivor Table (not included here). This reduces the RMD.

inherited_ira_10yr_rule.rule: Full distribution required by Dec 31 of the 10th year after death
inherited_ira_10yr_rule.annual_rmd_required: Yes, for years 1-9 if decedent had started RMDs (proposed regs 2024)
